textByHashes.57381bc79832f0ccd90a4b715c4b8dea348cc76a: You have a point. But I don't think red would be the best colour. It is the colour of blood, so it might give the wrong impression.
textByHashes.0fa4bb34a7f059d5ce0368daa93935634e7c40c9: I suggest green. I have heard that the plants that grow on the surface are mostly green, so surface-dwellers might find that colour soothing.
textByHashes.db71c5a15da1c42d4597e25764fb38a58d5abc11: Oh, hello surface-dweller. We were just discussing some council business.
textByHashes.c8a91c8148c82905e790d40e94956ca4db207afc: But we could do with an opinion. What colour do you think is best?
textByHashes.e148f7f09f8ca41233cb497025e2441dd49aca54: Thank you, surface-dweller. That's what I'll be recommending in the next meeting.
textByHashes.b33b1ed152f2c5ff84b74ca73dfbfdb71db4b2c9: Really? Which armour colour did they pick?
